reviews.comment: Amazing experience and professional team.
Communication was excellent from start to finish.
Best safari of our life! Highly recommended.
Super professional. Standard of accommodation and hospitality was first class.
Our driver/guides were extremely knowledgable, good spotters and fun to be with.
Professional, friendly, and well-organized. The guide made the experience fun and informative. Highly recommended for couples.
Unforgettable experience. Our guide Baraka was extremely knowledgeable, especially valuable for our research work.
Fantastic 10-day private safari. Our guide Patrick was a font of knowledge. Exceeded our high expectations.
Witnessed a river crossing – absolutely surreal.
Our guide found lions with cubs on day one.
The balloon safari at sunrise is unforgettable.
Marcus planned a fantastic 19-day trip. Felt like we were in contact with a friend, not a company.
Wonderful six-day safari. Our guide Benson may be the best guide we have ever had.
Second time using them. Saw all the Big Five. Would recommend to everyone.
Bungee jump and rafting combo was incredible.
Helicopter flight over the falls was breathtaking.
Sunset cruise on the Zambezi was magical.
10/10. Super well organized. Friendly, reliable, and attentive staff.
Incredibly kind, informative, and professional. They never let us down.
Sunrise climb on Dune 45 was absolutely magical.
Deadvlei photography tour was world-class.
Scenic flight over the dunes – stunning.
Fabulous in every way. If you want a smooth, stress-free trip, do not hesitate to book Vineyard Ventures. Best in town!
By far the best private guide experience. Glen was warm, generous, and entertaining.
Our guide Ali made the medina come alive. The souk shopping tour was exactly what we wanted.
Atlas Mountains day trip was unforgettable. Lunch with a Berber family was a highlight.
Cooking class at a riad was authentic and fun. Highly recommend this company.
Incredible dhow cruise and snorkeling trip.
Stone Town walking tour was very informative.
Spice farm visit exceeded expectations.
Unforgettable trip. The driver Mubarak was friendly, decent, and flexible. Every detail was accounted for.
Very professional and accommodating. If you want a good tour in Zanzibar, these are the people to go with.
Everything was very smooth. Had a desk at our resort which made booking a return trip very convenient.
Amazing service, very professional. Noria and Dereck helped make our experience wonderful.
Arnaud was very helpful and thorough. The catamaran trip to Ile aux Cerfs was a true highlight. Excellent value for money.
Incredibly knowledgeable. It was like we'd known him for years. If we go back, we'll be calling on Arnaud again.
Yoff surf conditions were perfect. Local guides knew the breaks and kept us safe.
Street art tour in Dakar's Medina was colorful and inspiring. So much talent in this city.
Gorée Island was haunting. The tour was respectful and informative. A must-visit in West Africa.
Self-drive in Etosha was easy with their 4x4 rental and map briefing. Saw elephants at the waterhole every night.
Floodlit waterhole at Okaukuejo is legendary. Rhino, elephant, and lion all at night.
Guided game drive found us a leopard in a tree. Excellent spotters.
Guided bush walk was thrilling. Our guide carried a rifle and taught us tracking skills.
Self-drive is easy in Kruger. Their pre-trip briefing helped us spot 4 of the Big Five on day one.
Sabi Sand private reserve upgrade was worth it. Leopard sightings every day.
Lemosho Route is stunning. Our guides got 9 of 9 group members to Uhuru Peak.
Acclimatization days were well-planned. Food was incredible for mountain conditions.
Safety first operation. Daily health checks and extra oxygen available. Made my summit possible.
Hour with the gorillas changed my life. Our guide got us to the Susa group within 45 minutes of trekking.
Golden monkey trek was a bonus. Playful and photogenic. Well-organized permits and transfers.
Community visit with former poacher turned conservationist added depth to the experience.
Sunset camel trek followed by Berber camp and stargazing. A bucket list experience done perfectly.
The luxury desert camp exceeded expectations. Hot shower, comfortable beds, and incredible food in the middle of nowhere.
Sandboarding was a blast. Our guide Hassan was knowledgeable and made sure everyone was safe and having fun.
Walking through the medieval medina with a historian guide made all the difference. Chouara Tannery from the rooftop view was breathtaking.
The pottery workshop and visit to the tanneries was well-organized. A deep dive into Fez craftsmanship.
Excellent guides who navigated the medina maze effortlessly. Felt completely safe and informed.
Mokoro canoe through the delta was serene and magical. Saw elephants, hippos, and a painted wolf pack.
Fly-in camp experience is worth every penny. The luxury in the wilderness is unmatched.
Our guide tracked wild dogs for three hours and found them. Best safari experience of our lives.
Valley of the Kings with an Egyptologist guide. Brought history to life in ways a book never could.
Hot air balloon over the West Bank at sunrise. Unforgettable views of temples and desert.
Felucca ride at sunset was peaceful and beautiful. Great organization from start to finish.
Inside the Great Pyramid is tight but incredible. Our guide knew exactly when to go to avoid crowds.
Sound and Light show at the Sphinx was dramatic and informative. A perfect end to our Giza day.
Camel ride around the pyramids felt like stepping back in time. Professional and well-managed tour.
The blue city is even more beautiful in person. Our guide knew every perfect photo spot.
Hike in the Rif Mountains was challenging but rewarding. Views of Chefchaouen from above are unforgettable.
Local artisan shopping tour was perfect. No pressure, just honest recommendations.
Snorkeled with dugongs. A rare and magical experience. The guides are conservation-focused and respectful.
Flamingo dunes hike was stunning. Pink lakes against white sand. Kids loved the dhow trip.
Diving on the Two Mile Reef. Some of the healthiest coral I've seen in 15 years of diving.
The Slave Route in Ouidah was moving and educational. Our guide explained the history with sensitivity and depth.
Pendjari lion sighting! West Africa's hidden safari gem. Basic but authentic experience.
Voodoo temple visit was fascinating. Our guide explained respectfully without sensationalism.
Horseback safari with rhinos. Safe for our teenagers and the guides were fantastic with the horses.
Big Five sightings without malaria risk. A game changer for travelers with health concerns.
Stargazing in the Waterberg was incredible. Dark skies and knowledgeable astronomy guide.
The Meroë pyramids at sunrise with no crowds. A completely different experience from Egypt and equally impressive.
Our archaeologist guide brought the Kushite kingdom to life. A hidden gem for history lovers.
Camel ride around the pyramids at sunset was magical. Off the beaten path in the best way.
The Tsingy via ferrata was terrifying and incredible. Our guide kept us safe and laughing.
Saw lemurs in the wild on our first day. The limestone forest is unlike anywhere else on Earth.
Night walk spotting chameleons and mouse lemurs was a highlight. Knowledgeable and passionate guides.

name: Discover Africa Safaris
location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
specialization: Bespoke Luxury Safaris across Southern & East Africa

reviews.comment: Excellent trip -- tour operators were professional and on time. Safari lodge choices excellent. Adelle communicated issues that cropped up in a timely manner and the whole process was a pleasure.
Our entire experience was magnificent. Everything was in place and perfectly reliable. We wanted for nothing and were taken care of every step of the way.

Cayleigh put together an 18 day tour of Victoria Falls, Botswana and Namibia that was the best trip we have ever taken! The service was so personal and professional, we were taken care of every single step of the way.
